title: Sherwin-Williams: Dividend Growth Prospects Are Absolutely Fantastic
text: Sherwin-Williams' brand recognition in the paint, coatings and related products market has helped it take advantage of an improving home improvement market in recent years. The Dividend Aristocrat has increased its dividend over the past 40+ consecutive years after adjusting for stock splits.

title: Sherwin Williams Needs Time to Cure
text: Sherwin-Williams Co. ( SHW , Financial) is the largest U.S.-based paint and coatings manufacturer and the third largest in the world. The company operates in North and South America, the Caribbean, Europe, Asia and Australia.
